notes: Generated with built-in image generation as a pure robot replacement for the earlier v1 Tide Recon sheet, which retained too many food-coded sushi cues.
The accepted source sheet contains six machine subjects: four evolution stages, one static sonar charge munition, and one disabled wreck defeat still.
The prompt explicitly prohibited sushi, rice, roe, fish, seaweed, and organic seal features while preserving the rounded submersible recon identity.
Background was removed with the imagegen remove_chroma_key.py helper. The transparent alpha scan found exactly six groups with source gutters of 103, 97, 67, 44, and 89 pixels.
